2606.05538.title: Less is MoE: Trimming Experts in Domain-Specialist Language Models
2606.05538.paper_summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models achieve strong performance through conditional computation, but their large parameter footprint poses deployment challenges. Prior MoE compression approaches catastrophically fail when evaluated on general-purpose benchmarks beyond commonsense reasoning. We trace this failure to the granularity of compression: important capabilities are distributed across experts but concentrated in FFN sparse intermediate dimensions. To identify these dimensions, we use Fisher importance which outperforms activation-, router-score-, and magnitude-based alternatives, and identifies tiny sets of task-critical dimensions: in Qwen1.5-MoE, removing as few as 12 of 1.35M routed-FFN intermediate dimensions collapses GSM8K accuracy while largely preserving factual-knowledge performance. Building on this, we propose Fisher-MoE, which operates within FFN to remove intermediate dimensions ranked by Fisher importance. At the same 50% MoE compression ratio, Fisher-MoE preserves model capability, while reducing weight memory by ~45% and improving inference throughput by 21%. These findings suggest intermediate dimension granularity is an effective unit for both compression and ranking where capability concentrates in MoE models.
2606.05538.paper_summary_zh: 混合專家（MoE）模型通過條件計算實現強大的性能，但其龐大的參數佔用在部署上帶來挑戰。先前的 MoE 壓縮方法在評估超出常識推理的一般性基準時慘遭失敗。我們將這一失敗追溯到壓縮的粒度：重要的能力分佈在專家之間，但集中在 FFN 稀疏的中間維度上。為了識別這些維度，我們使用費舍爾重要性，這一方法優於基於激活、路由分數和幅度的替代方案，並識別出一小組對任務至關重要的維度：在 Qwen1.5-MoE 中，去除少至 12 個 1.35M 路由的 FFN 中間維度會導致 GSM8K 準確率崩潰，同時在很大程度上保留事實知識性能。在此基礎上，我們提出了 Fisher-MoE，該方法在 FFN 內部運作，以去除根據費舍爾重要性排名的中間維度。在相同的 50% MoE 壓縮比下，Fisher-MoE 保留了模型能力，同時將權重記憶減少約 45%，並提高了推理吞吐量 21%。這些發現表明，中間維度的粒度是壓縮和排名的有效單位，因為能力在 MoE 模型中集中。
2606.05538.author: Haoze He et.al.
2606.05538.authors: Haoze He, Xinkai Zou, Xuan Jiang, Xingyuan Ding, Ao Qu, Juncheng Billy Li, Heather Miller
